spawning a bundled tool WITHOUT requesting the process permission is denied
a NON-bundled tool is denied even after it is requested ("not a bundled tool")
fs is denied until the fs capability is granted, then confined to the scoped folder
once bundled AND granted, a real process runs (confined)
REGRESSION: with the daemon's OLD allowlist (no bash), Create Project's spawn is denied
